name: odoo13-addon-photovoltaic-api
documentation:
This module provides a REST API to interact with various modules of the
    photovoltaic suite developed by Domatix and Librecoop

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.account.AccountService.signup_request
documentation:
Request to create a user from a partner
\:param vat: VAT
\:return: Signup token

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.account.AccountService.signup
documentation:
Confirm signup with a signup token
\:param token: Signup token from signup_request
\:param password: Password
\:return: {VAT, JWT Token}

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.account.AccountService.login
documentation:
Get JWT Token with login credentials
\:param vat: VAT
\:param password: Password
\:return: JWT Token

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.info.InfoService.person_types
documentation: Gets the list of person type ID and name

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.info.InfoService.countries
documentation: Gets the list of countries ID and name

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.info.InfoService.states
documentation: Gets the list of all states ID and name

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.info.InfoService.states_by_country
documentation: Gets the list of states ID and name for that country_id

methods.name: odoo.addons.photovoltaic_api.services.info.InfoService.interests
documentation: Gets the list of existing interests
